title: Title — Self-Healing Ecosystem Model
description: Hero title slide with cyberpunk ecosystem background and platform tagline.

title: The Problem — Ecosystems Are Collapsing
description: Three key statistics: 68% wildlife decline, 1M+ species at risk, zero real-time systems.

title: The Solution — Four Biomes, One Platform
description: Platform overview with all four biome types: Forest, River, Grassland, Polar.

title: ML Engine — 5 Models, One Intelligence Layer
description: All five ML models: Health Classifier, Recovery Predictor, Collapse Risk SVM, Lotka-Volterra, Recommender.

title: Architecture — Full-Stack Production System
description: Three-layer architecture: React + Vite frontend, Express API, PostgreSQL database.

title: Live System — Command Center Operational
description: Real live data: 10 ecosystems, avg health 80, 7 healthy / 2 stressed / 1 collapsing.

title: Closing — Ecosystem Command Center Online
description: Closing slide with key stats: 5 ML models, 4 biomes, 36 species. All systems operational.
